name: Wheat-Free Fruit-Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
Lightly oil and flour a (12-cup) muffin pan.
In a large bowl, combine rice flour, baking powder, and oat flour. In a separate bowl, mix cashews, honey, oil, milk, and eggs. Gently combine the egg mixture with the flour mixture. Stir in apricots and berries. Pour batter into prepared muffin cups.
Bake for 20 minutes or until muffins are lightly browned and springy to the touch.
